decision_summary: Approve v6.2.0 Worked Adoption Proof release.
rationale: The release proves a bounded fresh-project adoption path: managed-project init, first governed work chain, Work Governance benchmark, human-readable recognition summary, hygiene checks, and clear next action.
recommendation: Close TASK-064 after full verification and tag v6.2.0.
expected_user_reaction: They can understand the first governed work item without reading raw JSON.
artifact_change_recommendations: Keep adoption-proof-benchmark as the release gate for fresh-project usability.
organization_change_recommendations: Continue maker/checker/council separation and defer full multi-actor autonomy.
